controller_config.description: Common settings for a scraper controller configuration. Scraper controller receivers can embed this struct, instead of receiver.Settings, and extend it with more fields if needed.

collection_interval.description: Sets how frequently the scraper should be called and used as the context timeout to ensure that scrapers don't exceed the interval.

initial_delay.description: The initial start delay for the scraper, any non positive value is assumed to be immediately.

timeout.description: An optional value used to set scraper's context deadline.
